title: carex olbiensis
intro: Carex olbiensis, also known as Olbi's sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex olbiensis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Carex olbiensis can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
